briefs.title: BC Tightens Environmental Penalties and Contaminated Soil Rules — Key Changes Take Effect August 2026
briefs.summary: BC amended five environmental regulations, updating rules on administrative penalties (fines issued without a court), contaminated soil removal, wastewater, open burning, and ozone-depleting substances. A second round of penalty changes takes effect August 1, 2026.
briefs.action_required: Review your soil removal, waste disposal, and emissions practices to ensure compliance before August 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Administrative Penalties (Environmental Management Act) Regulation amendments take effect
